Registers the 'linters' library using Phutil in the Pebble firmware codebase.

# Purpose
The code is a PHP script that registers a library named `linters` using the `phutil_register_library` function. This script is intended to be part of a larger system where the `linters` library is utilized. The registration associates the library with the current file, allowing it to be included and used in other parts of the application. This functionality is narrow, focusing specifically on the registration of a library within a PHP environment.
